series_metadata.series_description: (A) These files are used to administer and enforce the provisions of Chapter 4729 of the Ohio Revised Code. The principle purpose of these files is for the enforcement of the Pharmacy Practice Act, the laws governing the legal distribution of drugs in Ohio and provide a standard automated processing procedure for renewal of pharmacist licenses. (B) These files contain information regarding providers of continuing education programs with respect to: (1) Name and address of provider; (2) Qualifications for approval as a provider; (3) Approved provider code number.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Paper: in agency provider is no longer active. ; Electronic: Electronic: on server provider is no longer active
